notes: Compound noun: heraus (out) + Forderung (demand/request). Often used in professional and personal contexts to describe a difficult but motivating task.

sentences.german: Das Erlernen einer neuen Sprache ist eine große Herausforderung.
sentences.english: Learning a new language is a big challenge.

sentences.german: Die Herausforderungen im Beruf machen mir Spaß.
sentences.english: The challenges at work are enjoyable for me.
